tasks.subject: Task 1: Normalize en.ts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make English copy internally consistent (no wording changes) before translating.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/locales/en.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/locales/en.compile.test.ts && rg -n '[curly]' src/locales/en.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["no curly quotes","ellipsis + plural fixed","no wording changes, @ escape intact"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Scaffold zh.ts + register + dual-locale compile & parity guards
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Key-complete zh.ts (English-valued placeholder), registered, with compile guard + key-parity guard over both locales.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/locales/zh.ts","dashboard/src/i18n.ts","dashboard/src/locales/locales.compile.test.ts","dashboard/src/locales/locales.parity.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/locales/ && npx vue-tsc -b","acceptanceCriteria":["zh scaffold = en copy","i18n registers en+zh","compile guard both locales","parity test"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: useLocale composable + App.vue init
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Persist locale to localStorage + detect navigator.language on first load; apply app-wide.

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/composables/useLocale.ts","dashboard/src/composables/useLocale.test.ts","dashboard/src/App.vue"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/composables/useLocale.test.ts && npx vitest run","acceptanceCriteria":["stored wins, else detect zh/en","persists on change","ignores unregistered","App.vue init"]}
```
